name: Hive Commonwealth
description: A collective society of flying insects forged in the presence of the Chaos Dragon, Valkor

Empress.description: The Empress is the ruler of a coalition of combined hives

Queens.description: Each queen is the biological and spiritual center of her community

Warriors.description: Their sole purpose is the defense of their queen

Workers.description: Their duties include hunting, foraging, and constructing hive homes

Outcasts.role: Individuals born without a connection to the hive mind
Outcasts.description: They are the primary interface with the outside world

military_doctrine.description: Designed for high-stakes asset extraction from environments hostile to the psyche

psychological_profile.strategic_imperatives: Unity and defense against psychic fragmentation
